summary: Readiness Contradiction Fix (Iteration 179) - All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Bug fixes for duplicate_risk and po_resolved signals verified. BC validation now correctly overrides stale flags.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review confirms bug fixes are correctly implemented:
1. document_readiness_service.py lines 100-115: duplicate_risk now checks BC validation duplicate_check first, only falls back to possible_duplicate if no BC check ran
2. document_readiness_service.py lines 82-98: po_resolved for AP_Invoice now checks BC validation po_check - if passed=False, overrides field presence to False
3. automation_intelligence_service.py lines 134-146: _duplicate_risk_score() returns 0.0 when BC check passed, 1.0 when failed, 0.7 fallback for possible_duplicate
4. document_readiness_service.py lines 404-474: evaluate_and_persist() detects signal contradictions and records readiness_contradiction_fix learning events
5. Learning events are recorded in both posting_learning_events and classification_corrections collections with source='readiness_self_correction'
seed_data_creation: None - tested with simulated document data and existing documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: Readiness Contradiction Fix fully tested. Key fixes verified: (1) compute_signals() duplicate_risk now checks BC validation duplicate_check first - if passed=True, returns False even with possible_duplicate=True; (2) compute_signals() po_resolved for AP_Invoice now checks BC validation po_check - if passed=False, returns False even with PO extracted; (3) _duplicate_risk_score() returns 0.0/1.0/0.7 based on BC check/failed/fallback; (4) evaluate_readiness() correctly excludes duplicate_risk from blocking_reasons when BC check passed; (5) evaluate_and_persist() records readiness_contradiction_fix learning events when signals change; (6) All API endpoints working: GET /api/readiness/metrics, GET /api/readiness/queue, POST /api/readiness/evaluate/{doc_id}, GET /api/posting-patterns/learning-dashboard

unit_tests: compute_signals() duplicate_risk=False when BC duplicate_check passed=True - PASS
compute_signals() duplicate_risk=True when BC duplicate_check passed=False - PASS
compute_signals() duplicate_risk fallback to possible_duplicate when no BC check - PASS
compute_signals() po_resolved=False for AP_Invoice when BC po_check passed=False - PASS
compute_signals() po_resolved=True for AP_Invoice when no BC po_check and PO extracted - PASS
compute_signals() po_resolved=True when BC po_check passed=True - PASS
_duplicate_risk_score() returns 0.0 when BC check passed - PASS
_duplicate_risk_score() returns 1.0 when BC check failed - PASS
evaluate_readiness() no duplicate_risk blocker when BC passed - PASS
evaluate_readiness() duplicate_risk blocker when BC failed - PASS
api_tests: POST /api/readiness/evaluate/{doc_id} - Returns 404 for non-existent doc - PASS
integration_tests: Full scenario: AP_Invoice with possible_duplicate=True, BC duplicate_check passed=True, BC po_check passed=False - PASS

mocked_apis.note: All tests use real service functions and API endpoints. No mocking required.

duplicate_risk_contradiction.issue: Duplicate Check says 'No duplicate found' but Readiness blocks on 'duplicate risk' because stale possible_duplicate flag from ingestion was never cleared by BC validation
duplicate_risk_contradiction.fix: compute_signals() now checks BC validation duplicate_check first. If passed=True, duplicate_risk=False regardless of possible_duplicate flag

po_resolved_contradiction.issue: PO shows 'resolved' in signals but BC validation says 'PO not found in BC' because for AP_Invoice, po_resolved was just set to po_extracted (field presence) ignoring the actual BC check result
po_resolved_contradiction.fix: compute_signals() for non-shipping docs (AP_Invoice) now checks BC validation po_check. If passed=False, po_resolved=False even if PO was extracted

learning_mechanism.issue: System should LEARN from these contradictions when re-evaluating
learning_mechanism.fix: evaluate_and_persist() detects signal changes (duplicate_risk True→False, po_resolved True→False) and records readiness_contradiction_fix learning events
